description: A local-first AI security assistant powered by Google Gemma 4 through Ollama. Every review, scan, and chat runs on the user's machine.

tools.name: review
tools.description: Review a single source file for security, testing, complexity, and style issues.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Path to the source file to review. Example: data/sample_code/bad_login.php

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Ollama model to use for the review.

tools.name: review_dir
tools.description: Batch-review every source file in a directory.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Path to the directory containing source files. Example: data/sample_code

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Ollama model to use for each review.

parameters.name: recursive
parameters.description: Whether to recurse into subdirectories.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Code snippet to review.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Programming language hint. Example: python, php, javascript

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Ollama model to use for the review.

tools.name: scan
tools.description: Scan untrusted text, prompts, or email content for prompt injection, destructive commands, and encoded payloads.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Text content to scan.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Classification of the input source.

parameters.name: decode
parameters.description: Decode embedded base64, hex, and URL-encoded payloads.

parameters.name: deep
parameters.description: Run an optional Gemma 4 deep-analysis scan.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Ollama model to use for the deep scan.

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Compare the active model and a second local model on the same prompt, with optional AI judge summary.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Prompt to send to both models.

parameters.name: active_model
parameters.description: First / active model. Example: gemma4:e2b

parameters.name: compare_model
parameters.description: Second model to compare against. Example: qwen2.5

parameters.name: system
parameters.description: Optional system prompt.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature.

parameters.name: deep_model
parameters.description: Optional judge model for the AI summary. Defaults to active_model.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Return the local environment status: Ollama reachability, available models, and recent action counts.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of recent entries to return.
